headline: Newmont Corp (NYSE:NEM) Passes Peter Lynch's GARP Screen as a Growth at a Reasonable Price Stock
summary: Newmont Corp passes Peter Lynch's GARP screen with 21.1% annual EPS growth, a PEG ratio of 0.51, low debt, and strong profitability, making it a compelling value-growth opportunity in gold mining.
